item.title: Has Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd has declared a 10% dividend with an ex-date of March 13, 2026. While recent total returns over shorter periods have been negative, longer-term returns indicate significant growth. Time: Mar 10 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Has Railtel Corporation of India Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Railtel Corporation of India Ltd has declared a 10% dividend, with an ex-date of March 13, 2026, and a dividend yield of 0.99%. While recent total returns have been negative in the short term, the company has shown strong positive returns over longer periods. Time: Mar 10 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Vivimed Labs Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Vivimed Labs Ltd is 13 March 2026. Time: Mar 10 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: What is the bonus history of eClerx Services?
item.description: eClerx Services has a history of issuing bonus shares, with the most recent being a 1:1 bonus announced on March 13, 2026. Previous bonuses include a 1:2 bonus on September 21, 2022, a 1:3 bonus on December 17, 2015, and another 1:2 bonus on July 23, 2010. Time: Mar 10 2026 11:00 PM IST

item.title: GE Vernova T&D Added to Stock of the Month List on Strong Quarterly Performance
item.description: GE Vernova T&D, a mid-cap player in the heavy electrical equipment sector, has been added to the prestigious Stock of the Month list as of 10 March 2026, reflecting its robust financial performance and bullish technical outlook. The company’s recent quarterly results and upward momentum position it as a compelling investment opportunity within the mid-cap universe. Time: Mar 10 2026 09:15 PM IST

item.title: Garuda Construction and Engineering Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Garuda Construction and Engineering Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness in the construction sector stock. Time: Mar 10 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: NMDC Steel Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: NMDC Steel Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend and long-term weakness in the stock’s price momentum. Time: Mar 10 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Vaidya Sane Ayurved Laboratories Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Vaidya Sane Ayurved Laboratories Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness in the hospital sector micro-cap. Time: Mar 10 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Cartrade Tech Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Cartrade Tech Ltd has recently experienced a significant technical development as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-day moving average, forming a Death Cross. This event is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raising concerns about its long-term strength amid challenging market conditions. Time: Mar 10 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: Mar 10 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Zota Health Care Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Zota Health Care Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development often signals a shift towards a bearish trend and suggests a deterioration in the stock’s momentum, raising concerns about its near- to medium-term outlook. Time: Mar 10 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Universal Cables Ltd. Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Universal Cables Ltd., a small-cap player in the Cables - Electricals sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s near to medium-term outlook. Time: Mar 10 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Kartik Investments Trust Ltd Hits New 52-Week High at Rs.1318.85
item.description: Kartik Investments Trust Ltd reached a significant milestone today by hitting a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs.1318.85, marking a notable 5.00% gain on the day and outperforming its sector by 2.85% amid a mixed market environment. Time: Mar 10 2026 06:00 PM IST
